opportunities.title: Godzilla Got a Tabletop RPG — Here's Why Legendary Actions Alone Won't Sell the Scale
opportunities.why_now: Podcast #406 just teased a Godzilla RPG, giving a hook to dissect kaiju-scale combat design against 5e's stock giant-monster toolkit.
opportunities.angle: Creature tactic breakdown: how to houserule a 'city-block' reach/AoE stomp and lair actions for any oversized 5e monster, using Godzilla as the case study.

opportunities.title: Sly Flourish's Adventure Types Ranked by How Much Prep They Actually Save You
opportunities.why_now: Fresh Sly Flourish analysis on adventure types dropped this week and is squarely GM-advice territory this audience already follows.
opportunities.angle: Rapid-fire ruling/prep short: take each adventure type from the article and give a one-line 'when to use it, when it wastes your Tuesday night' verdict.

opportunities.title: Arcana Unleashed's New Backgrounds Give Combat Features — Does 5e's Background System Even Compete?
opportunities.why_now: Podcast #406 previewed Arcana Unleashed's background overhaul, a direct rules-design comparison point for 5e's largely non-mechanical backgrounds.
opportunities.angle: Spell/feature use-case short: pick one Arcana Unleashed background combat perk and show how a 5e DM could port it in as a variant feat or downtime boon.

opportunities.title: 'A Spoonful of Sugar' — The One Death Save Ruling That Keeps Young Players at the Table
opportunities.why_now: EN World's RPG Evolution column this week is about softening mayhem for younger/newer players, a live rules-adjudication topic GMs argue about constantly.
opportunities.angle: Dry ruling short: state the RAW death/dying rule, then give the exact house-rule wording that lowers stakes without gutting tension, framed as a GM adjudication call.

opportunities.title: Stat-Blocking a Cloud Empress Bio-Horror for 5e in Under 60 Seconds
opportunities.why_now: This week's RPG Print News roundup spotlights Cloud Empress, a biopunk setting ripe for a quick creature-conversion demo tied to a genuinely new release.
opportunities.angle: Creature tactic short: reskin an existing 5e monster (e.g., otyugh or shambling mound) into a Cloud Empress-style bio-horror with one signature tactic, no full stat block needed.
